creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you visit this Stunning Spa with NYC Views? - only a 30 minute bus ride from Manhattan

*location and transit details are pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #travel #nybucketlist #spa

transcription.text: This might be the best fall I've ever been to, but the price was the part that actually shocked me. The resort has 8 floors and over 150,000 square feet of amenities. They start you off in the heated hydrogen pool with jet baths, water installations and New York City views. Then you'll dip your toes in the foot massage path which leads to the bathing area. This has a silk bath, a carbon bath, and a hinoki bath with a bamboo forest and a waterfall right in the middle. Making your way inside, you'll find 8 different saunas including ganban yoku, charcoal, himalayan pink salt, white clay, red clay, and an ice room. You can also enjoy multiple relaxation rooms, a fitness center, a volcanic sand bath, korean body scrubs, massages, halo therapy, and grab a meal at the giant food court before enjoying the best part. On the very top floor, you'll step out onto this massive heated infinity pool that overlooks the New York City skyline on one side and a snowy mountain on the other. If you go during the week, you can find admission for only $90 and stay as long as you want. This is called Sojo Spa in Edgewater, New Jersey.
